abilities.name: Melee Expert
abilities.description: Generates additional AP on turn, may only use for Close Combat attack.

abilities.name: Aquatic
abilities.description: Speed not reduced while swimming. Can take Charge Action underwater.

abilities.name: Ruthless
abilities.description: Automatically succeeds at any Willpower duel it attempts during turn.

abilities.name: Unimpeded
abilities.description: Ignores terrain penalties when taking Movement Actions.

actions: (1) Fearsome Jaws (Pugilism) | AV: 5 (11) | Rg: y2 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 2/3/5 damage. Ram Death Roll: When damaging, Attack gains + to damage flip, target Prone. Crow Swallow Whole: After damaging target with lower Height, target must discard card or be killed and eaten.
(0) Creep | Character/controller may discard card to move distance equal to Walk.
system.notes: Most efficient ambush predators of swamps. Wait in/near water looking like logs. Drag prey to water to drown. Perform death roll to dismember. Hungry ones charge staggering distances.
